description: Stacked area chart driven by DuckDB SQL query.

sql.description: DuckDB SQL query with {{udf_name}} and $param_name placeholders. Must return 'label', 'series', and 'value' columns.

areaOpacity.description: Opacity of each stacked area from 0 to 1.

showGrid.description: Show subtle grid lines behind the chart.

showBrush.description: Show brush slider for range selection.

brushHeight.description: Height of brush slider in pixels.

xAxisFontSize.description: X-axis label font size in pixels.

yAxisFontSize.description: Y-axis label font size in pixels.

beginAtZero.description: Force y-axis to start at zero.

animationMs.description: Animation duration in milliseconds. 0 disables animation. Animation only plays on data changes, not on zoom/resize.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string.

propsSchema.description: A stacked area chart powered by DuckDB SQL. Query should return label, series, and value.
